name: @aztec-fpc/topup
description: Background service that keeps the MultiAssetFPC funded with Fee Juice

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir=dist --target=bun --external @aztec/bb.js --external pino && bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; BUNDLE="dist/index.js"; NOIRC_WASM=""; ACVM_WASM=""; NOIRC_JS_REL="$(grep -m1 -o "../../node_modules/.bun/@aztec+noir-noirc_abi@[^\"]*/node_modules/@aztec/noir-noirc_abi/web/noirc_abi_wasm.js" "$BUNDLE" || true)"; ACVM_JS_REL="$(grep -m1 -o "../../node_modules/.bun/@aztec+noir-acvm_js@[^\"]*/node_modules/@aztec/noir-acvm_js/web/acvm_js.js" "$BUNDLE" || true)"; if [ -n "$NOIRC_JS_REL" ]; then NOIRC_WASM="${NOIRC_JS_REL%/noirc_abi_wasm.js}/noirc_abi_wasm_bg.wasm"; fi; if [ -n "$ACVM_JS_REL" ]; then ACVM_WASM="${ACVM_JS_REL%/acvm_js.js}/acvm_js_bg.wasm"; fi; if [ -z "$NOIRC_WASM" ] || [ ! -f "$NOIRC_WASM" ]; then NOIRC_WASM="$(find ../../node_modules -type f -path "*/@aztec+noir-noirc_abi@*/node_modules/@aztec/noir-noirc_abi/web/noirc_abi_wasm_bg.wasm" | grep -v "/.old_modules-" | sort -V | tail -n1)"; fi; if [ -z "$ACVM_WASM" ] || [ ! -f "$ACVM_WASM" ]; then ACVM_WASM="$(find ../../node_modules -type f -path "*/@aztec+noir-acvm_js@*/node_modules/@aztec/noir-acvm_js/web/acvm_js_bg.wasm" | grep -v "/.old_modules-" | sort -V | tail -n1)"; fi; test -n "$NOIRC_WASM"; test -n "$ACVM_WASM"; test -f "$NOIRC_WASM"; test -f "$ACVM_WASM"; cp -f "$NOIRC_WASM" dist/noirc_abi_wasm_bg.wasm; cp -f "$ACVM_WASM" dist/acvm_js_bg.wasm'
